title: SantraKhao
description: SantraKhao is a 16x and 32x mix bedwars texture pack.
body:
### What is this resource pack?
SantraKhao 16x is a Bedwars/PvP texture pack for Minecraft 1.8. It is an edit of Wallibear’s 1 Million Subscriber pack (Wallifault) with new custom swords, tools, ender pearl, and more. This pack keeps the clean 16x style while adding a fresh PvP look for smoother gameplay.

### Requirements

- Minecraft 1.8
- OptiFine (recommended for best visuals)

### How to use this resource pack?
This pack is compatible with all other resource packs. Just make sure to place it on top of the one you are already using in your resource pack order.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a942285edbdad7fd5bedca73ba08ed3e41cdcfb.jpeg)
